flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Palomar College rose 38% between 2007 and 2010 ($600 → $826).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Palomar College rose 31% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.7k → $3.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Palomar College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Palomar College rose 47% between 2007 and 2010 (16.1k → 23.7k).
